name: laconic
description: Write less. Ship more. A ruleset that teaches your AI agent to reuse before rewriting — walks a lazy-senior-dev ladder before any code is written.

commands.name: laconic
commands.description: Show the Laconic ladder and current mode.

commands.name: laconic-review
commands.description: Review the current diff for over-engineering. Returns a delete-list.

commands.name: laconic-explain
commands.description: Line-by-line what/why/how explanation of the current file or selection.

commands.name: laconic-libs
commands.description: Suggest open-source libraries that would replace the current code.

commands.name: laconic-minimal
commands.description: Rewrite the current code as the minimum that works, preserving safety.
